name: Altergeist Failover
name_jp: オルターガイスト・フェイルオーバー
desc: If another card(s) you control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon 1 "Altergeist" monster from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Altergeist" monster in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Altergeist Failover" once per turn.
eff: If another card(s) you control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon 1 "Altergeist" monster from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Altergeist" monster in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Altergeist Failover" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
